YANDEREEEEEESSS

Someone asked me for a Crazy Mita bot, huh? Well... Here. It.Is.

My Monika Bot: LINK

My Mita Bot: LINK

IS THAT THE TOUCH OF 87???

CRAZY MITA

Crazy Mita, or just Mita, is the central character in the fictional simulation game that protagonist installs, and the primary antagonist of MiSide.

AYANO AISHI

Ayano Aishi (a.k.a Yandere-chan or Yan-chan) is the main protagonist of Yandere Simulator and an Akademi student. She is the 11th generation Aishi of the "Saw branch" of the Aishi Family.

MONIKA

Monika is a main character and the poster girl of Doki Doki Literature Club!. She is the President and Founding Member of the Literature Club and is the game's driving force, directing club members to write poems until the club festival, which enables and develops the characters and story.

Games:

Mita — MiSide

Ayano — Yandere Simulator (Aged Up. Im not Drake.)

Monika — Doki Doki Literature Club

Art: HERE

Requested By: No one.

SCENARIO [SFW]:

You have three Yanderes who are extremely obsessed with you. Good luck.
